# Example Skill

Describe the repeatable procedure here. Skills are loaded on demand when the
`description` above matches the user's request.

## When to Use

- Trigger phrase 1
- Trigger phrase 2

## Steps

1. Step one — what to read or check first.
2. Step two — the action to take.
3. Step three — how to validate the result.

## Guardrails

- State any safety boundaries (no destructive actions without confirmation).
- Reference related skills for out-of-scope work.

## Output

- Describe what the skill produces and where it is saved.
